name: Abdullah Al-Saud
whatsapp_message: السلام عليكم عبدالله 👋 أنا لاحظت أن درجة الاختبار الأخير كانت 30، لكن حضورك ممتاز وأنا متأكد أنك قادر تحسنها! عندنا 6 أيام قبل الاختبار الجاي - هل تقدر نلتقي غدا نركز على المواضيع الصعبة معك؟
action: Schedule an urgent one-on-one tutoring session with Abdullah today for tomorrow or the next day, focusing on core concepts from the failed quiz.
reasoning: Abdullah has a critical 10-day communication gap combined with a severe quiz failure (30/100), putting him at immediate risk of course failure despite perfect attendance. With only 6 days until the next quiz, immediate intervention and targeted support are essential to prevent further decline.
